ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timber_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the timber is logged */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the timber */,
  "approx_trees" INTEGER /* Approximate number of trees */,
  "est_vol_32_log" REAL /* Estimated volume in MBF for 32' logs */,
  "est_vol_16_log" REAL /* Estimated volume in MBF for 16' logs */,
  "appraised_price_per_mbf" REAL /* Appraised price per MBF */,
  "estimated_vol_price" REAL /* Estimated total value of the timber */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the timber was harvested */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method used for harvesting */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the timber */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timber_inventory_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timber_inventory_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logging site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the logging site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the logging site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Area of the logging site in square kilometers */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., public, private) */,
  "site_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site manager */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last site inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_site_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the tree species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species characteristics */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Average growth rate of the species */,
  "maturity_age" INTEGER /* Average age at which the species reaches maturity */,
  "wood_density" REAL /* Density of the wood in kg/m³ */,
  "common_uses" TEXT /* Common uses of the wood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appraisals" (
  "appraisal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appraisal record */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record being appraised */,
  "appraisal_date" TEXT /* Date of the appraisal */,
  "appraised_value" REAL /* Total appraised value of the timber */,
  "appraiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appraiser who performed the appraisal */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the appraisal */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appraisal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appraisal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appraisals_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES timber_inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appraisals_appraiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("appraiser_id") REFERENCES appraisers ("appraiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appraisers" (
  "appraiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appraiser */,
  "appraiser_name" TEXT /* Full name of the appraiser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the appraiser */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification held by the appraiser */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the appraiser */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appraiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, forester, appraiser) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the timber */,
  "buyer" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of delivery */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES timber_inventory ("inventory_id")
)
